reviews.review_title: Amazing! VR needs more of this!
reviews.review_description: I love fantasy world exploration VR & this is fabulous! You walk through mazes but never hit a boundary, it's awesome & the different experiences have been so enjoyable. Highly recommended!

developer_response.body: Highly appreciated and so great to hear you like it so much.

reviews.review_description: Very cool room scale experiences. I sadly don’t have much space to enjoy it fully but a stick locomotion was added recently to get a glimpse of what it would look like if you had enough physical space.

developer_response.body: Thanks a lot and if you get the chance to play in a bigger space with actual walking around, definitely give it a try!

reviews.review_description:
This is a really great concept for a VR game, but its execution is pretty poor all-around and the UX/UI is miserably unpolished. 

There is an occasional text-to-speech voice which reads on the main menu occasionally and through at least one of the puzzles I tried, which is a pretty lazy way to guide the user through the experience. When I’m being attacked in some of the puzzles by an enemy or threat, there’s no cue at all on where the threat is coming from, leading me to spin in circles and eventually die. There is also no incentive for me to conserve ammunition when armed with a gun, as I can reload extremely quickly. The graphics are all-around pretty poor with some redeeming areas. I’m also a little disappointed in the puzzle that is locked off unless I get a hint from… your Discord server? Seems pretty cheap.

The overall concept is very interesting at first but the poor experience doesn’t warrant this title many replays from me. This game has a long, long way to go in my opinion as the polish is clearly not there yet.

developer_response.body: Thank you for the feedback. Content, graphics and replayability is all being worked on!

reviews.review_title: Just a copy of tea for god
reviews.review_description: Was just a simple version of tea for God on sidequest

developer_response.body: Thanks for playing and sad to see you perceive the game that way. TfG is a great game and fundamentally different. traVRsal really tries to focus on providing multiple smaller experiences, each show-casing different aspects of impossible spaces. There are 7 worlds now already, allowing you to explore a Pyramid in a platformer-like setting, bringing you to space with Pac-Man mechanics, allowing you to create your own virtual gallery and much more. There are online challenges to beat other players and Multiplayer will be introduced soon. Hope to see you back one day!

reviews.review_description: I just don’t see any potential in this game

developer_response.body:
It's sad you see it this way and I'd love to understand what makes you think so! There is so much more planned already now, with Multiplayer being probably the most awaited one. Imagine a shooter or a game of tag where you actually walk and fight your opponents. It will hardly get any more immersive than that I think.

I invite you to my Discord to learn more: discord.travrsal.com

reviews.review_description:
I had an issue with the game stuck in loading but that can be fixed by clearing the cache as the developer pointed out instantly. 
The game is such a cool experience that everyone should try. I just wish there was more games like it

developer_response.body: No worries we'll get this sorted out! We have a great discord channel to ask exactly such support questions (discord.travrsal.com). I suspect it's simply a temporary caching glitch. The easiest way to solve is will be: restart the app. Without opening any worlds go to Settings/Advanced and click the Clear Cache button. Then try again loading the the world. It will indeed download around 200Mb the first time you launch it and will start of course much faster for every start beyond that. Please try that and would be great to have to able to play!

reviews.review_title: I haven't written a review before...
reviews.review_description:
But I felt like I had to. This game is absolutely incredible and is the immersion you seek when purchasing a VR console.

I've only played for 30 minutes, I can't wait to find out what else there is!
It may be my playspace that is just big enough, but I find it easy to drop out of maps. When it works though, wow is this game immersive.

This is the next level of immersiveness in VR.  A few bugs, but overall, the concept works extremely well at putting you completely in a different environment.  Can't wait to see what's further developed from this.
This game is fantastic.  I cannot wait for it to cool down outside so I can play in a huge area.  Must have for everyone.

developer_response.body: Thank you very much! Highly appreciated.

reviews.review_description:
Blown away by this. Looking forward to future content.

It has an SDK so anyone can make games using room scale impossible room navigation. This needs to be advertised by Meta as it's truly the next level VR, being able to actually walk around instead of just using an analogue or teleporting.
Really cool that you get to use all your room space. Love the puzzles

The concept of this game is incredible and truly feels like what vr was made for. The gameplay is simple but captivating because of how immersive it truly is. It’s fun, it’s captivating, and it feels good to play. Great game, looking forward to the future development of this and other projects from the creators.
Spent the whole evening with my GF figuring out this pyramid. So much fun! Tip: try casting the quest 2 to your phone (oculus) so a friend can think along / watch. Amazing concept.

reviews.review_title: THIS is what VR should be!
reviews.review_description:
I've always wanted a game that makes full use of room scale movement.. This is when you truly feel as though you are transported to a new place. This is done in such a clever way too that I had never considered myself.
Massive props to the dev and I will be showing all my friends this game who have just got themselves a quest as a must have experience. Thank you so much for creating what I've always wanted!
I will be following the development closely and excitedly. Cheers!!

developer_response.body: Thanks alot for this feedback! And as of yesterday, you can even play together with friends in the first impossible spaces VR multiplayer game.

reviews.review_description: What an ingenious idea for utilizing roomscale in order to make VR even more immersive. I played one map and I was hooked. Must have looked like an idiot doing little laps and circles in my office alone but man was it fun. I hope this takes off and people keep creating new and unique experiences. Can't believe this is a free app!

reviews.review_title: Obnoxious sounds on the start screen
reviews.review_description: The obnoxious grunting and growling from the start screen coming from the skulls doesn't stop when you enter a level. I'd love it if I didn't have to listen to that gross sound over and over on a loop.

developer_response.body: That is a good feedback. What you are seeing and hearing is the Halloween Special Edition of the game with some temporary set-dressing! Since there were also other players a bit irritated by the monster sounds I just released an update which puts them to sleep for now (the monsters, not the players) and will rethink how to better integrate the audio side for Halloween. Have fun! And if you have good ideas please always raise them in discord.travrsal.com

reviews.review_description:
Fun family escape room!

Looking forward to more, thank you!

Really cool game that I highly encourage to try out. What I liked most is that I can physically walk within the game like I would do in real life and it’s really immersive/addictive. Honestly, It’s hard to stop playing because you simply have fun to explore those worlds and try escaping the map in time with your full body in real movements. You have different modes (escape, find something, etc.) which really enrich the overall gaming experience. So, If you’re looking for a nice game to start your VR journey or you simply want to have a fun immersive experience, try it because you gonna love it! Kudos traVRsal team.
It has been so far the best experience for a new comer. Very funny game that I don't stop playing and playing.

developer_response.body: Thanks a lot! It's really great to hear you are enjoying the game so much. And there is much more to come.
